languages.text: "Крайне желательно, пусть я и не вправе настаивать, Лорд-капитан".
"Not essential, but highly desirable. Though I have no right to insist, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: "Крайне желательно, пусть я и не вправе настаивать, Лорд-капитан".

traits.locale_text: "Not essential, but highly desirable. Though I have no right to insist, Lord Captain."
"Not essential, but highly desirable. Though I have no right to insist, Lord Captain."
"Not essential, but highly desirable. Though I have no right to insist, Lord Captain."

languages.text: “倒也不是必须，但我非常希望您能回答。尽管我无权这么要求您，舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: "Not essential, but highly desirable. Though I have no right to insist, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: “倒也不是必须，但我非常希望您能回答。尽管我无权这么要求您，舰长大人。”

languages.text: «Necesario quizá no, aunque sería conveniente. Pero no tengo derecho a insistir, Lord Capitán».
languages.original_text: "Not essential, but highly desirable. Though I have no right to insist, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: «Necesario quizá no, aunque sería conveniente. Pero no tengo derecho a insistir, Lord Capitán».

languages.text: « Ce n'est pas nécessaire, mais hautement désirable. Mais je ne suis pas en position d'insister, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »
languages.original_text: "Not essential, but highly desirable. Though I have no right to insist, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: « Ce n'est pas nécessaire, mais hautement désirable. Mais je ne suis pas en position d'insister, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. »

languages.text: "Nicht essential, aber überaus wünschenswert. Wobei ich nicht das Recht habe, zu insistieren, Lord Captain."
languages.original_text: "Not essential, but highly desirable. Though I have no right to insist, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Nicht essential, aber überaus wünschenswert. Wobei ich nicht das Recht habe, zu insistieren, Lord Captain."

languages.text: "Elzem değil ama son derece arzu edilir. Gerçi ısrar etme hakkım yok ama Lord Kaptan."
languages.original_text: "Not essential, but highly desirable. Though I have no right to insist, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: "Elzem değil ama son derece arzu edilir. Gerçi ısrar etme hakkım yok ama Lord Kaptan."

languages.text: 「必須ではないが、非常に望ましい。だが、私は主張する権利はない。艦長様」
languages.original_text: "Not essential, but highly desirable. Though I have no right to insist, Lord Captain."

traits.locale_text: 「必須ではないが、非常に望ましい。だが、私は主張する権利はない。艦長様」
